name: codex-commit-widget
description: Generate git commit messages in VS Code using Codex.

codexCommitWidget.codexCommand.description: Path or command name for the Codex CLI.

codexCommitWidget.model.description: Optional Codex model to pass with --model. Leave empty to use your default.

codexCommitWidget.maxDiffChars.description: Maximum number of diff characters sent to Codex.

codexCommitWidget.promptTemplate.default: You are generating a git commit message. Return only the final commit message, no code fences, no explanations. Use conventional commits when appropriate. Prefer a single-line subject under 72 characters unless the change clearly needs a body. Summarize the staged changes accurately.
codexCommitWidget.promptTemplate.description: Prompt prefix sent to Codex before the diff.
